name: create_script
description: Create a new C# script file in the Unity project. The script will be placed under Assets/Scripts/ by default unless a different path is specified. After creation, Unity will automatically compile the script.

file_path.description: The file path relative to the Assets folder, e.g. 'Scripts/PlayerController.cs'. Must end with '.cs'.

content.description: The full C# source code content of the script.
